title: sedum lydium
intro: Sedum lydium, also known as White Sedum, is a succulent plant that belongs to the family Crassulaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been used to treat various health conditions, such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, due to its health benefits of reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. Sedum lydium can be prepared for herbal use through infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which have been traditionally used to treat various ailments.
